configurations.name: flutter-app
configurations.comment: Serves the Flutter bundle AND the /api + /admin routes on one origin (8080) via the gateway's --web-root. This is the supported way to run the admin UI: the app's base URL defaults to its own origin, so same-origin is required for API calls to resolve. The old bin/serve_app.dart (8090) only served static files and did NOT proxy /api, which left every screen unable to load data.
runtimeArgs: Set-Location 'C:\Development\SAPGateway\server'; $env:PYTHON_EXE='python'; dart run bin/server.dart --auth-user admin --auth-pass s3cret --web-root 'C:\Development\SAPGateway\app\build\web'
